description: COUNT(*) always returns a non-nullable i64, even on empty tables

columns.name: cnt
columns.note: COUNT(*) never returns NULL, returns 0 on empty set

name: count_star_non_null
query_sql:
-- @name CountUsers
-- @returns :one
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM users
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, bio TEXT, age INTEGER, score NUMERIC, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now())
